species: FOLR1 knockdown in neural organoids and in Xenopus laevis embryos leads to NTDs...
cell_type: FOLR1 localizes to apicolateral regions of neural cells surrounding the lumen...
disease_state: Folate supplementation reduces the occurrence of neural tube defects (NTDs)...
sample_source: human induced pluripotent stem cell (hiPSC)-derived neural organoids
To examine the role of FOLR1 in the formation of the neural tube we developed human induced pluripotent stem cell (hiPSC)-derived neural organoids.
